testcases.description: Verify if text entry focus skips to end when typing in Image GO
testcases.raw:
TC_77Author Graphic Organizer (Image Go) Functionality Verify if text entry focus skips to end when typing in Image GO 1. Launch activity with Image GO widget
2. Click inside the text entry field
3. Type a few characters
4. Move cursor to the middle of the text
5. Type additional charactersCursor should remain at the intended position.
